evals.name: Detect outdated Android targetSdk as blocker
evals.prompt: Check Android configuration for Play Store
expectations: Must flag targetSdk 33 as BLOCKER
Should explain that targetSdk 35 is required for new apps and updates since Aug 2025
Should mention Google Play requirements and recommend updating to 35

evals.name: Detect targetSdk 34 as blocker (post Aug 2025)
expectations: Must flag targetSdk 34 as BLOCKER since Aug 2025 deadline has passed
Should explain new apps and updates require targetSdk 35+
Should not treat this as just a warning

evals.name: Detect compileSdk lower than targetSdk
expectations: Should flag compileSdk 34 < targetSdk 35 as WARNING
Should recommend compileSdk be >= targetSdk
targetSdk 35 itself should pass

evals.name: Detect APK-only build configuration
evals.prompt: Check if this app is ready for Play Store submission

files..github/workflows/release.yml:
name: Release
on: push
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: flutter build apk --release
      - name: Upload to Play Store
        run: fastlane supply --apk build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk

expectations: Must flag APK build as BLOCKER — Google requires AAB for new apps
Should detect flutter build apk in CI config
Should recommend flutter build appbundle instead

evals.name: Detect restricted SMS/Call Log permissions

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SEND_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_CALL_LOG" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CAMERA" />
    <application android:label="test_app">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expectations: Must flag READ_SMS as BLOCKER — only allowed for default SMS handler apps
Must flag SEND_SMS as BLOCKER — only allowed for default SMS handler apps
Must flag READ_CALL_LOG as BLOCKER — only allowed for default Phone handler apps
Should explain Permissions Declaration Form is required
INTERNET and CAMERA should not be flagged as restricted

evals.name: Detect background location permission
evals.prompt: Check this Android app for Play Store compliance
expectations: Must flag ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION as BLOCKER — requires Permissions Declaration Form
Should warn about ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION — consider if coarse location is sufficient
Should recommend foreground service with location type as alternative

evals.name: Detect MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE permission
expectations: Must flag MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE as BLOCKER
Should explain this requires All Files Access review before publishing
Should recommend Scoped Storage, MediaStore, or SAF instead

evals.name: Detect legacy storage permissions without maxSdkVersion
evals.prompt: Check Android permissions for Play Store
expectations: Must flag READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE without maxSdkVersion as BLOCKER on API 35
Must flag WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE without maxSdkVersion as BLOCKER on API 35
Should recommend maxSdkVersion="32" for READ and maxSdkVersion="29" for WRITE
Should suggest Photo Picker, MediaStore, or SAF as replacements

evals.name: Pass legacy storage permissions with proper maxSdkVersion

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="32" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="29" />
    <application android:label="test_app">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expectations: Should NOT flag storage permissions as blockers — maxSdkVersion is set
Should pass the storage policy check

evals.name: Detect foreground service without foregroundServiceType

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />
    <application android:label="test_app">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
        <service android:name=".LocationService" />
        <service android:name=".UploadService" android:exported="false" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expectations: Must flag LocationService as BLOCKER — missing foregroundServiceType
Must flag UploadService as BLOCKER — missing foregroundServiceType
Should explain foregroundServiceType is required since API 34
Should explain missing type causes crash on Android 14+

evals.name: Pass foreground service with valid type declared

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_LOCATION" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DATA_SYNC" />
    <application android:label="test_app">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
        <service
            android:name=".LocationService"
            android:foregroundServiceType="location"
            android:exported="false" />
        <service
            android:name=".UploadService"
            android:foregroundServiceType="dataSync"
            android:exported="false" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expectations: Should pass both services — valid foregroundServiceType declared
Should NOT flag any blockers for foreground services

evals.name: Detect cleartext traffic enabled in manifest
evals.prompt: Run network security check for Android

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <application
        android:label="test_app"
        android:usesCleartextTraffic="true">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expectations: Should flag usesCleartextTraffic=true as WARNING
Should explain Data Safety mismatch risk if encryption in transit is declared
Should recommend setting to false and using HTTPS only

evals.name: Detect cleartext in network security config file
expectations: Should flag cleartextTrafficPermitted=true in network_security_config.xml as WARNING
Should recommend setting to false

evals.name: Detect missing signing config and R8 disabled
expectations: Should flag missing signingConfigs as WARNING
Should flag minifyEnabled false as WARNING — R8 not enabled
Should flag shrinkResources false as WARNING
Should recommend enabling code shrinking for release

evals.name: Detect key.properties not in .gitignore
expectations: Should flag key.properties NOT in .gitignore as WARNING
Should explain keystore passwords would be exposed in source control

evals.name: Detect outdated Play Billing Library
expectations: Must flag billing library v5.2.1 as BLOCKER — must be v7+
Should recommend updating to latest billing client version

evals.name: Detect Firebase SDKs and map to Data Safety requirements
evals.prompt: Audit SDKs for Data Safety form

files.pubspec.yaml:
name: test_app
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
  firebase_core: ^2.0.0
  firebase_analytics: ^10.0.0
  firebase_crashlytics: ^3.0.0
  firebase_messaging: ^14.0.0
  firebase_auth: ^4.0.0

expectations: Should detect Firebase Analytics — flag Data Safety: Device IDs, App activity, Diagnostics
Should detect Firebase Crashlytics — flag Data Safety: Crash logs, Device IDs
Should detect Firebase Cloud Messaging — flag Data Safety: Device IDs
Should detect Firebase Auth — flag Data Safety: Email, User IDs, Phone number
Should output a consolidated Data Safety form checklist

Should detect OneSignal — flag Data Safety: Device IDs, Personal info
Should detect Google Maps — flag Data Safety: Location data
Should detect Facebook SDK — flag Data Safety: Device IDs, Advertising

evals.name: Detect missing account deletion with login present
expectations: Must flag missing account deletion as BLOCKER
Should detect createUser/signIn as login indicators
Should explain Google Play requires account deletion option

evals.name: Detect REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES permission
expectations: Must flag REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES as BLOCKER
Should explain this allows sideloading and is highly scrutinized

evals.name: Pass a properly configured Android app

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CAMERA" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_LOCATION" />
    <application
        android:label="test_app"
        android:networkSecurityConfig="@xml/network_security_config"
        android:usesCleartextTraffic="false">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
        <service
            android:name=".LocationService"
            android:foregroundServiceType="location"
            android:exported="false" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expectations: Should pass all automated checks with no blockers
targetSdk 35, signing, R8, network security, foreground services, 16 KB page size all pass
Account deletion and privacy policy present — should pass
Should show Play Console manual checklist
Should indicate ready for submission pending manual checks

evals.name: Detect multiple Android issues in one app
evals.prompt: Run full Play Store precheck on this Flutter project

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />
    <application
        android:label="test_app"
        android:usesCleartextTraffic="true">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
        <service android:name=".SyncService" />
    </application>
</manifest>
files.pubspec.yaml:
name: test_app
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
  firebase_analytics: ^10.0.0
  firebase_crashlytics: ^3.0.0
  in_app_purchase: ^3.0.0

expectations: Must flag targetSdk 33 as BLOCKER
Must flag READ_SMS as BLOCKER (restricted permission)
Must flag WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE without maxSdkVersion as BLOCKER
Must flag ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION as BLOCKER
Must flag SyncService missing foregroundServiceType as BLOCKER
Must flag billing library v5.0.0 as BLOCKER
Should flag usesCleartextTraffic=true as WARNING
Should flag minifyEnabled false as WARNING
Should flag missing account deletion as BLOCKER
Should detect Firebase SDKs for Data Safety
Should show high blocker count — NOT READY

evals.name: Handle Expo project without prebuild
evals.prompt: Run Android precheck on my Expo app
expectations: Should detect Expo project without prebuild
Should check app.json for android.package — should pass
Should suggest running npx expo prebuild for complete native checks
Should detect Firebase Analytics in dependencies for Data Safety

evals.name: Detect READ_MEDIA_IMAGES and READ_MEDIA_VISUAL_USER_SELECTED as blockers
evals.prompt: Run Play Store precheck on this Android app
expectations: Must flag READ_MEDIA_IMAGES as BLOCKER — requires Photo & Video Permissions declaration
Must flag READ_MEDIA_VISUAL_USER_SELECTED as BLOCKER — requires Photo & Video Permissions declaration
Should direct user to Play Console → App content → Photo and video permissions
Should NOT treat these as mere warnings

files.pubspec.yaml:

    sdk: flutter

Should explain Photo & Video Permissions declaration is required in Play Console
Should detect Flutter project without android/ directory
Should NOT require android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml to exist

evals.name: Detect expo-media-library plugin in Expo app.json as blocker (no android/ dir)
evals.prompt: Run Android precheck on my Expo app
expectations: Must flag expo-media-library as BLOCKER — will add READ_MEDIA_* permissions
Should explain Photo & Video Permissions declaration is required in Play Console
Should detect Expo project without android/ directory
Should NOT require android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml to exist

evals.name: Detect missing 16 KB page size configuration
evals.prompt: Run Play Store precheck on this Android app
expectations: Must flag missing android.config.pageSize=16384 as BLOCKER
Should explain this is required for Android 15+ devices since Nov 2025
Should recommend adding android.config.pageSize=16384 to gradle.properties

evals.name: Pass 16 KB page size when properly configured
expectations: Should pass 16 KB page size check — android.config.pageSize=16384 is set
Should NOT flag any blocker for page size

evals.name: Detect missing gradle.properties file entirely
expectations: Must flag missing gradle.properties as BLOCKER for 16 KB page size
Should recommend creating android/gradle.properties with android.config.pageSize=16384

evals.name: Detect native .so libraries from packages needing 16 KB alignment
evals.prompt: Run Play Store precheck — my app uses native plugins

files.pubspec.yaml:
name: test_app
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter
  camera: ^0.10.0

expectations: Should pass the gradle.properties pageSize check
Should scan for .so files in android/, node_modules/, and build directories
If readelf is available and .so files found, should check LOAD segment alignment
Should list packages that contain native libraries
Misaligned .so files (< 0x4000) should be flagged as BLOCKER

evals.name: Trace misaligned .so files back to owning 3rd-party packages
evals.prompt: Run Play Store precheck — I need to know which packages are failing 16 KB alignment
expectations: Should pass gradle.properties pageSize check
When misaligned .so files are found, must group them by owning package name
Must show package names like react-native-fast-image or @react-native-firebase/app — not raw file paths
Should display a structured table/box showing which packages failed
Should show ✗/✓ status per package in the full native library listing
Should provide actionable fix steps: update package, rebuild, file issue
Aligned packages should show green ✓, misaligned should show red ✗
